data.name: NTR Tales – Adventurer Corruption
data.detailed_description:
NTR Tales: Adventurer Corruption is a 2D erotic RPG featuring corruption, exploration, and dynamic storytelling.

A tale of love, lust, and the slow fall of innocence.

Since time immemorial, two mighty beings have clashed in the celestial realms, far beyond mortal sight.

The Goddess of Light, bearer of Hope.

The Queen of Demons, mother of Lust and Corruption.

To end their eternal war, a wager was made.

Champions were chosen, and fate began to weave their destiny.

Our story begins in a peaceful village... Two friends, united by a common desire: to become adventurers.

Their hearts beat as one, bound by a force they believe to be eternal.

Guided by their ambitions, they set off for Valebridge, a joyful city where laughter abounds, and love flourishes.

Behind the smiles and promises of glory, temptation lurks in the shadows. The dungeon grows deeper, awaiting those who dare to descend, in its relentless pursuit.

Will she remain faithful to the love she feels... or succumb to the warmth of another's touch?

You play as Caelum, and while you're off to buy equipment, Aria wanders the city. Team up with allies, though not all will have pure intentions.

✔️ More than 100 erotic events, either in battle, on field or in special events.

✔️ Lust system that changes dialogues, reactions and Aria's behavior.

✔️ "Sex Event Launcher" lets you play or preview all content.

✔️ Rename main characters (Caelum, Aria, ???, ???)

✔️ Speed Up the game with "Ctrl"

✔️ Pause On-Field event with "P"

✔️ Four endings: Game Over, Neutral, True Love, and Corrupted.

🔞 This game contains explicit sexual content intended for adults only. 🔞
All characters are 21 years or older.
No non-consensual or underage material is depicted.

The focus is on netorare.
Caelum may not understand what happens... but you will.

For those who dare to resist temptation, a True Love path exists.

data.short_description: Aria and Caelum become adventurers in Valebridge. Explore the city, discover more than 100 erotic events, and see how curiosity can lead to corruption in this adult 2D RPG.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft Windows® 8/8.1/10/11 (64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGL / VRAM 1GB or better
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Microsoft Windows® 10/11 (64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-4340 or better
  • 記憶體: 8 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGL / VRAM 2GB or better
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
